name: dreamteam
description: Domain-agnostic meta-orchestration for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini & CodeWhale: a Caster assembles a cost-aware crew (per-role model tiers) and drives a task or approved plan to a verified result through a per-workstream produce -> gate -> fix -> integrate loop with independent review gates (Reality Checker always on the panel) and a post-run learning retro.
